title: toHtml route swallows OpenAI API errors
body: app/api/toHtml/route.ts calls openai.chat.completions.create() with no try/catch, so a rate-limit error or invalid API key turns into an unhandled 500 with no useful message returned to the frontend modal.

title: Large canvases crash before hitting the max-size clamp
body: lib/getSvgAsImage.ts renders the tldraw SVG onto a canvas without first clamping dimensions via getBrowserCanvasMaxSize.ts, so a very large wireframe throws a canvas allocation error in Safari instead of being downscaled.

title: PreviewModal gives no feedback when copying HTML fails
body: components/PreviewModal.tsx calls the clipboard API to copy the generated HTML but doesn't handle a rejected promise (e.g. clipboard permission denied), leaving the user unsure whether the copy actually worked.

title: README doesn't mention required OPENAI_API_KEY
body: New users following the setup instructions hit an immediate failure from route.ts because the OpenAI client needs OPENAI_API_KEY, but this requirement isn't called out anywhere in the README.
